g.text: Apps speak one wire format (OTLP). The Collector receives, processes, fans out. Backends are swappable.
- both (sidecar -> gateway is the prod default)
1 instrumentation surface -> 1 OTLP wire format -> N backends
Switch from Datadog to Grafana Cloud? Reconfigure exporters. No code change in any service.
Add a new backend? New exporter in the Collector. Zero new SDK installs.
Pre-OTel: vendor lock-in cost = reinstrument every service. Post-OTel: lock-in cost = a config edit.
